text:
Trump's own people warned you:

- General Mattis (his Defense Secretary): "a threat to the Constitution"
- General Milley (his Joint Chiefs Chair): "fascist to the core"
- General Kelly (his Chief of Staff): "contempt for democratic institutions"
- Bill Barr (his Attorney General): confirmed no widespread election fraud

These aren't Democrats. These aren't media pundits. These are the people HE picked. They saw him up close and they are terrified.
